stimulus: Toni Dove’s Spectropia, an interactive film, an unusual hybrid of early twentieth-century pulp serials with motion-tracking gaming technologies, ______blank audience members to step in front of a screen and physically guide the story’s heroine through a richly detailed cinematic world.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "invites" agrees in number with the singular subject "Toni Dove’s Spectropia, an interactive film."

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "invite" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject. Choice B is incorrect because the plural verb "have invited" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject. Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "are inviting" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject.
